insertion_note.best_insertion_point: new standalone proposal-equation script using RSFit-aligned step segments
insertion_note.why_current_models_miss_target: Current Utah FORGE paths either use delay proxies (tau_lag), memory surrogates (tau_avg, tau_ema, S), or theta-informed libraries with extra interaction terms, and many reported equations stay in normalized coordinates or without sign constraints. That makes them useful surrogates, but not clean recoveries of the two proposal equations.
insertion_note.train_steps: p5838_step3, p5838_step8, p5838_step9, p5838_step4, p5838_step5, p5838_step10

summary.final_conclusion: Exact equation (2) not identifiable from current data; best fallback model is B_reduced_rsf
